summary: Phase A cleanup — frontend-only verification with super_admin login. All 6 acceptance criteria PASSED.
verified_flows: Launchpad (/app): launch-card-ai-settings, launch-card-notifications-permissions, launch-card-leave all ABSENT. Expected cards (dashboard/projects/hr/settings/website-config) PRESENT.

Settings (/app/settings): all 5 tabs (settings-tab-gmail, -templates, -notifications, -ai, -notif-perm) rendered. Clicking settings-tab-ai mounts settings-ai-pane (AISettings UI). Clicking settings-tab-notif-perm mounts settings-notif-perm-pane (NotifPermissions UI).
Deep links: /app/settings?tab=ai opens AI pane. /app/settings?tab=notif-perm opens Notif. Permissions pane.

Legacy redirects: /app/ai-settings -> /app/settings?tab=ai (settings-ai-pane rendered). /app/notifications-permissions -> /app/settings?tab=notif-perm (settings-notif-perm-pane rendered). Implemented via <Navigate replace> in App.js for both /app and /m portals (lines 202, 204, 245, 247).
HR Team Access (/app/hr): 10 hr-tab-* present, hr-tab-team-access between onboarding and leave. Clicking renders AdminsTab; acl-new-admin button visible & enabled; clicking opens Create Admin modal.
Team page (/app/team, All Team tab): acl-new-admin is disabled=true with class cursor-not-allowed; acl-read-only-hint amber info card visible directing users to HR -> Team Access.
rbac_note: Intern role RBAC was NOT explicitly re-verified in this run (existing usePermissions gate unchanged; no code paths affected by Phase A). Settings & HR cards already gated by roles:['admin','super_admin'] / ['admin','super_admin','hr','manager'] in CARDS_PORTAL — gating is untouched.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx (line 28-30): URLSearchParams reads window.location.search at component init only. If user navigates between ?tab=ai and ?tab=notif-perm via in-app links without a full reload, the initial state will not re-sync. Consider deriving from useLocation().search via useEffect for safer query-param syncing.

Settings.jsx clears query string in GmailPane fetchStatus useEffect via window.history.replaceState({}, '', '/app/settings') (line 123) — this also wipes ?tab=ai|notif-perm if a Gmail OAuth redirect lands while user is on those tabs. Low risk but worth noting.

Launchpad.jsx CARDS_PORTAL: cards order has Dashboard, Projects, Chat, Leads, Team, Finance, AI, Booking (Calendly), Profile, HR, Settings, Website Config. With 6 per page on mobile, this still produces 2 pages — acceptable.
HRModule.jsx: AdminsTab is imported from AccessControl and rendered with canCreate={true} — verified working end-to-end including modal open.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A is fully shipped & verified. Next phases B/C/D (per problem statement, 6 enhancements split into 4 phases) still pending. Smoke regression on Newsletter Compose-from-blog flow and HR Onboarding create flow was NOT run in this iteration to keep scope tight — main agent can self-validate or request a separate regression pass.
